description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a flat roof and a large covered porch supported by columns at the front. The exterior is finished in light-colored brick, and the house features numerous large rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors, allowing ample natural light inside. The main entryway is accentuated by a prominent arched window above the door, and the porch area includes steps and seating. The interior is visible through the windows, revealing a modern open-plan layout with a staircase, living area, and dining space. The house has a clean, modern aesthetic with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms. The roof and porch surfaces are flat and expansive, providing potential for outdoor use.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, light brick exterior, large symmetrical windows, and a spacious covered front porch with columns and steps.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial interior of the house, highlighting the large windows, open-plan living space, and the staircase inside.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entryway with an arched window above the door, the covered porch with columns, and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: This side view reveals additional large windows, the flat roof, and a glimpse of the interior layout, including a visible bathroom and living area.
description_view_3: The rear view shows more symmetrical windows and the back wall, with the arched window and dining area visible through the glass.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with an arched window above the door, covered porch with columns, steps, and minimal decorative elements.
